how_it_is_computed: Count lexical matches for decision/tradeoff markers; clamp to 10; negated closure phrases remove some positive decision hits.
where_it_is_consumed: router/analyzer.py:decision_from_analysis (demotes OPERATOR->EXPLORATION if 0 and no decision markers); router/runtime/state_updater.py:build_router_state (stored on state)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium risk: purely lexical token counting; no context weighting.

how_it_is_computed: Count matches for evidence + uncertainty + characterization uncertainty markers; clamp to 10.
where_it_is_consumed: router/runtime/planner.py:should_fastpath_direct guard (blocks direct fastpath when both evidence_demand and decision_pressure are >0); router/runtime/state_updater.py:build_router_state (stored as evidence_quality)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium: lexical and broad terms; can under/over-fire.

how_it_is_computed: Count fragility/stress-test/risk markers + launch/trust markers; clamp to 10.
where_it_is_consumed: router/analyzer.py:decision_from_analysis (demotes ADVERSARIAL->EXPLORATION if 0); router/runtime/planner.py:should_fastpath_direct (blocks direct fastpath if >0)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium: term-list driven, may miss implicit fragility.

how_it_is_computed: Weighted lexical count: 2*strong recurrence hits + 2*builder hits; generic 'pattern' tracked in markers but not scored; clamp to 10.
where_it_is_consumed: router/analyzer.py:decision_from_analysis (demotes BUILDER primary and BUILDER endpoint when 0); router/orchestration/transition_rules.py:next_stage (OPERATOR->BUILDER if completion and >=2.0); router/orchestration/stop_policy.py:_builder_blocked (blocks BUILDER recommendation if <7); router/runtime/state_updater.py:build_router_state (stored)
whether_it_can_deny_a_switch: Yes (builder switch can be denied by stop policy threshold)
whether_it_can_stop_the_run: Yes (builder blocked reason can end orchestration loop)
whether_it_can_block_reentry: Indirect (prevents some forward moves, not reentry check itself)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: High: two thresholds (>=2 for transition, >=7 for builder gate) create inconsistent authority from a lexical score.

how_it_is_computed: Count possibility/open-space and anti-convergence markers; clamp to 10; some negated closure tokens are merged into anti-convergence markers.
where_it_is_consumed: No material consumption found in inspected orchestration/runtime files (presented to analyzer prompt as context only).
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: High stale/underpowered risk: computed and surfaced but not behaviorally wired downstream in inspected path.

how_it_is_computed: Deterministic conjunction checks for expansion-when-defined, concrete-too-small, parts/whole mismatch families.
where_it_is_consumed: router/runtime/planner.py (default task_signals if none provided); router/analyzer.py:_build_user_prompt (fed to analyzer); router/runtime/state_updater.py:build_router_state (added to assumptions text)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium-high: primarily prompt/context decoration; limited hard-control usage.

how_it_is_computed: Stores matched lexical marker groups by thematic family (uncertainty, decision, fragility, recurrence, possibility, etc.).
where_it_is_consumed: router/analyzer.py:decision_from_analysis (uses decision_tradeoff_commitment presence to avoid over-demotion of OPERATOR); router/analyzer.py:_build_user_prompt (full marker map sent to analyzer)
whether_it_can_override_analyzer: Yes, narrowly (decision marker presence can preserve OPERATOR recommendation)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Low-medium: one key has leverage; rest mostly analyzer context.

how_it_is_computed: Model-generated stage score vector validated/parsing repaired; then ranked in decision_from_analysis.
whether_it_can_override_analyzer: Primary source of analyzer route (subject to deterministic demotions)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium: LLM-derived; but clamped by deterministic guardrails.

how_it_is_computed: Model-estimated confidence, then bucketed into high/medium/low in decision_from_analysis; also used in direct fastpath predicate.
whether_it_can_override_analyzer: No direct override of chosen stage, but influences fastpath behavior
whether_it_can_stop_the_run: Indirect (can alter whether orchestration is bypassed via direct path)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium-high: one scalar gates direct fastpath with very high threshold and no calibration check.

how_it_is_computed: Model-proposed endpoint stage; clamped in decision_from_analysis to not precede primary and demoted BUILDER->OPERATOR if recurrence_potential==0.
where_it_is_consumed: router/analyzer.py:decision_from_analysis (route metadata); router/orchestration/stop_policy.py:_endpoint_stage (stop target selection via routing_decision)
whether_it_can_override_analyzer: Partially (can be clamped/demoted by deterministic rules)
whether_it_can_stop_the_run: Yes (stop policy halts when artifact complete at/past endpoint)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium: influential for stopping horizon; somewhat protected by clamping.

how_it_is_computed: Parsed from model output JSON; artifact_complete requires valid output + non-empty completion + completion!=failure.
where_it_is_consumed: router/orchestration/switch_orchestrator.py:orchestrate (transition trigger and observed cause fallback); router/orchestration/transition_rules.py:next_stage; router/orchestration/stop_policy.py:_artifact_complete/should_stop; router/runtime/state_updater.py:update_router_state_from_execution (record_regime_step completion flag)
whether_it_can_deny_a_switch: Can suppress switch if absent (no structured signal case)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Low-medium: strongly validated before trusted, but still model-emitted string.

how_it_is_computed: Parsed from model output JSON; used alongside semantic/control validation outcomes and misrouting detection.
where_it_is_consumed: router/orchestration/switch_orchestrator.py:orchestrate (switch cause selection, collapse detection input); router/orchestration/transition_rules.py:next_stage (e.g., SYNTHESIS failure->EPISTEMIC/ADVERSARIAL, OPERATOR failure with misrouting->EPISTEMIC); router/orchestration/stop_policy.py:_artifact_complete (blocks stop if equals completion); router/runtime/state_updater.py (marks failure seen)
whether_it_can_deny_a_switch: Yes (drives transitions and can prevent completion-based stop)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium: high authority from free-form string, partly mitigated by validation + stage constraints.

how_it_is_computed: If parsed recommended_next_regime is a valid Stage string, resolve and store; otherwise keep prior recommendation.
where_it_is_consumed: router/orchestration/stop_policy.py:_should_defer_stop_for_forward_recommendation (defers stop when forward stage <= endpoint); router/runtime/session_runtime.py (used as prior_recommended_next rollback reference)
whether_it_can_override_analyzer: Can counter analyzer stopping intent by deferring stop
whether_it_can_deny_a_switch: Indirect (affects whether orchestration continues rather than denying switch)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium-high: model-suggested field can extend run when artifact is already complete.

source_file/function: router/state RouterState lifecycle (populated when regime steps are recorded/executed)
how_it_is_computed: State history of stages already executed in current orchestration session.
where_it_is_consumed: router/runtime/session_runtime.py:run_orchestration_loop (denies switch if next stage already executed unless collapse reentry allowance applies)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Low: clear loop-guard purpose; high authority is intentional.

how_it_is_computed: Set from semantic failure, failure/completion signal, misrouting, collapse detection, bad-output detection, or bounds conditions.
where_it_is_consumed: router/runtime/session_runtime.py:_allow_collapse_reentry (only allows prior-stage reentry when cause includes 'collapse'); switch decision logs and stop reasons
whether_it_can_deny_a_switch: Yes (indirectly: if cause lacks 'collapse', reentry denied)
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: Medium: overloaded cause label acts as policy key; naming drift could silently change reentry behavior.

how_it_is_computed: Initialized from routing_decision.switch_trigger; propagated into switch decision records for traceability.
whether_it_is_likely_stale_/_legacy_/_un: High stale risk: appears informational only; not used for control decisions in inspected path.
